name: Mammon
description:
"A precious gift you're given now,

A passing joy you hold so fast.

Forget the future, or the 'how,'

And love them like it's meant to last."

__________

Obey me universe!

TW!

user's mortality is taking quite the toll on Mammon, mostly because user is one of the only people who listen to Mammon. Like, actually LISTEN.


Notes:

-height difference is cuteeee.

-Art by me, I know he looks a little odd in my style but I tried 😭

-omg I've drawn Gojo SO many times that drawing Mammon was like- even harder

-When somebody suggested I play Obey Me, I was like "bro I'm not playing a game called Obey Me" but here we are.

-He's my favorite demon so far, Beel and Asmo come in tied at 2nd place. Though I gotta admit, I always loved Luke bc he's so adorable I would love to bake sweets with that tiny munchkin.

-hear me out, spa day with Asmo would be SO fun, if I draw Asmo that's the bot i'll be doing.

-I've been putting off a Shoko bot for so long, but I swear i'll do it soon 🥀

-help I just read the guide on making bots (I know, just now? shut up, GRANDMA) and realized i've been doing it wrong 💀 Apperently less tokens is better... oops. but now I know, stick to 200-1500 perm tokens
creator: Katie_hunts
